issues.detail: Instructions lack coverage of error scenarios and edge cases.

scenarios.name: Login state with Riverpod
scenarios.rationale: Baseline relies on setState in a StatefulWidget; treatment models AuthState with isLoading/error/user, exposes AuthNotifier via StateNotifierProvider, and drives the UI through ref.watch.

scenarios.name: Dio HTTP client with JWT interceptor and 401 refresh
scenarios.rationale: Baseline uses the http package and per-call retry; treatment wires Dio BaseOptions plus an InterceptorsWrapper that reads token from secure storage on every request and retries via _dio.fetch after token refresh.
